title: strophanthus mortehanii
intro: Strophanthus mortehanii is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa, belonging to the Apocynaceae family of flowering plants. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its cardiac glycosides, which have a positive inotropic effect, increasing the force of cardiac contractions. The health benefits of Strophanthus mortehanii include its ability to treat various heart conditions, such as atrial fibrillation and heart failure, as well as its potential use in treating certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Strophanthus mortehanii are typically made by extracting the plant's cardiac glycosides and combining them with other herbal ingredients to create tonics or supplements.
